caption: A woman with dark hair and wearing over-ear headphones is captured in a series of frames while speaking. She is dressed in a striped purple and white shirt. The setting appears to be an indoor room with a light-colored wall and a beige curtain with a blue edge visible in the background. To her right, a light-colored piece of furniture is partially visible. The text "Nancy Ramya" is displayed in the bottom left of each scene. Throughout the sequence, the woman remains in a centered, head-and-shoulders shot, facing forward and speaking. Her facial expressions and mouth movements shift slightly as she talks, but her position and the surrounding environment remain stationary across the duration of the clip.
